_publications._publicationTitle: Interpreting mammalian target of rapamycin and cell growth inhibition in a genetically engineered mouse model of Nf1-deficient astrocytes.

_contextSnippet: brain rapamycin levels were exponentially correlated with blood rapamycin levels ( Fig. 1C ) (R 2 = 0.8 and P<0.0001)
resourceName: Nf1 GFAP CKO mice (Nf1 flox/flox; GFAP-Cre)
details: Brain rapamycin levels were exponentially correlated with blood rapamycin levels (R² = 0.8, P<0.0001) with dose-dependent increases in both blood and brain tissue concentrations
